meaning: n.细节,详细adj.特殊的,特别的,独特的,详细的,精确的,挑剔
examples: He loves science fiction in particular.
These documents are of particular interest.
One player in particular deserves a mention.
The government must get its finances in order and, in particular, rein in spending.
Rome, like most cities, is a collection of districts, all with their particular character.
